title: Live install console and first-run fixes

notes.heading: Live install console
notes.body: Install and update tasks now refresh quickly while they run, keep much more output, and show active SteamCMD progress in the log panel.

notes.heading: Interactive task input
notes.body: You can type into a running install/update task, send quit, or stop the task from the log panel if SteamCMD gets stuck.

notes.heading: Better server detection
notes.body: The app now looks for the dedicated server executable name used by the Steam app and shows clearer install diagnostics.

notes.heading: Safer first-run flow
notes.body: A fresh install is shown only when server files are missing. After install, normal update controls are emphasized and repair asks for extra confirmation.

notes.heading: Cleaner layout
notes.body: The dashboard now keeps the sidebar footer and live logs visible without forcing you to scroll the whole app window.

notes.heading: Real button icons
notes.body: Action buttons and navigation now use SVG icons instead of fallback letters or C-shaped placeholders.
